name: Chicken Cannellini
recipeIngredient: 500 g dried cannellini beans (or other white bean)
1/2 yellow pepper, deseeded and roughly diced
1/2 red pepper, deseeded and roughly diced
1/2 green pepper, deseeded and roughly diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight.
2. Separate the chicken legs and place them in a baking pan. Bake at 180°C for 45 minutes, turning over halfway through. Let cool in the pan.
3. Brown the lardons in a large frying pan. Add onions, garlic, and peppers; add oil if needed. Sauté until onions are softened.
4. Place all ingredients in a large pot. Drain beans and add to the pot. Add enough stock to cover the beans with about an inch of liquid over. Bring to boil, skim off foam, add herbs, turn down heat, cover, and simmer slowly for about 1 hour.
5. Remove chicken from bones and add to bean mixture. For extra flavor, also add bones. Adjust seasoning. Simmer for an additional half hour or until beans are tender. Remove bones and serve.
Yield: 4-6 servings
